roadmaps.title: 9-Day Reset
roadmaps.goal: Rebuild learning momentum by taking one concept all the way to a shipped artifact.
roadmaps.description: A short sprint to break inertia. End the nine days with one real artifact — a working BM25 search — and the loop muscle memory restored.

milestones.title: Days 1-3 — Retrieval foundations
milestones.goal: Understand how lexical search ranks documents.

milestones.title: Days 4-6 — Build
milestones.goal: Implement a working BM25 ranker on a real index.

milestones.title: Days 7-9 — Ship and review
milestones.goal: Finish the artifact, write it up, and schedule reviews.

roadmaps.title: 30-Day Retrieval Basics
roadmaps.goal: Build a solid foundation in both lexical and vector retrieval, ending with hybrid search.
roadmaps.description: Four weeks that take you from tokenization to a working hybrid retriever evaluated against a frozen query set.

milestones.title: Week 1 — Lexical retrieval
milestones.goal: Tokenization, inverted index, BM25.

milestones.title: Week 2 — Evaluation
milestones.goal: Make retrieval quality measurable.

milestones.title: Week 3 — Vector retrieval
milestones.goal: Embeddings, similarity, exact nearest-neighbour search.

milestones.title: Week 4 — Hybrid search
milestones.goal: Fuse lexical and vector retrieval and prove it wins.

roadmaps.title: 90-Day AI Search & Infrastructure
roadmaps.goal: Build a strong retrieval, vector, AI-systems, and storage foundation through HighSignal and Codevetter.
roadmaps.description: The core roadmap. Three months that move from retrieval basics to ANN, RAG, and the storage foundations behind systems like Turbopuffer.

milestones.title: Month 1 — Retrieval and evaluation
milestones.goal: Lexical + vector retrieval, hybrid search, evals.

milestones.title: Month 2 — Vector databases and ANN
milestones.goal: Brute force, HNSW, filtering, recall/latency tradeoffs.

milestones.title: Month 3 — AI systems and storage
milestones.goal: RAG with evals, plus the storage foundations underneath.

roadmaps.title: 12-Month Advanced AI Infrastructure
roadmaps.goal: Reach the depth to design and reason about systems like Turbopuffer, and ship them through HighSignal and Codevetter.
roadmaps.description: The long arc. A year of compounding depth across search, vector databases, AI systems, backend, storage, and system design — measured in shipped artifacts and project features.

milestones.title: Q1 — Retrieval and vector foundations
milestones.goal: Complete the 90-day AI search/infra roadmap.

milestones.title: Q2 — Production backend depth
milestones.goal: API platform strength: keys, limits, idempotency, queues, observability.

milestones.title: Q3 — Storage systems
milestones.goal: Build the storage foundations behind a Turbopuffer-class system.

milestones.title: Q4 — System design and synthesis
milestones.goal: Turn the depth into architecture-level design and a real prototype.

roadmaps.title: Disk-First Databases & RAM
roadmaps.goal: Build a mechanism-first mental model of how disk-based DBs spend RAM, and why.
roadmaps.description: Companion to docs/learning/db-roadmap.md. Phased link-hub roadmap from the disk-first DB PDF: RAM vs SSD, storage engines, LSM, columnar/vectorized execution, ClickHouse internals, cloud warehouses, search/vector, distributed correctness, and a synthesis project.

milestones.title: Phase 0-1 — Thesis + hardware
milestones.goal: Frame active state vs stored data; understand CPU cache, DRAM, NVMe, page cache, mmap.

milestones.title: Phase 2 — Disk-oriented storage engines
milestones.goal: Pages, B+trees, WAL, buffer pools, recovery.

milestones.title: Phase 3 — LSM and SSD-first design
milestones.goal: Memtables, SSTables, Bloom filters, compaction, read/write/space amplification.

milestones.title: Phase 4-5 — Columnar execution + ClickHouse
milestones.goal: Vectorized execution, projection/filter pushdown, external operators, MergeTree internals.

milestones.title: Phase 6 — Cloud warehouses
milestones.goal: Storage/compute separation, shuffle, slots/warehouses, result caching.

milestones.title: Phase 7 — Search + vector DBs
milestones.goal: Inverted indexes, BM25, HNSW, IVF, PQ, DiskANN, recall/latency/memory tradeoff.

milestones.title: Phase 8 — Distributed correctness
milestones.goal: Replication, Raft/Paxos, MVCC across nodes, 2PC, serializability.

milestones.title: Phase 9 — Synthesis project
milestones.goal: Ship one of: low-RAM benchmark, ch-lowram CLI, spill-first OLAP engine, or disk-backed vector search.

roadmaps.title: Runtime — what every runtime has to do
roadmaps.goal: Build one cross-cutting mental model for V8, JVM, Go, BEAM, .NET CLR, vLLM, SGLang, Cloudflare Workers, and wasmtime.
roadmaps.description: Companion to docs/learning/runtime-roadmap.md. Treats every runtime as doing the same five jobs: execute, allocate, schedule, isolate, observe. Phases cover each job, then deep-dives into language runtimes, AI inference runtimes, and edge runtimes.

milestones.title: Phase 0-1 — Five-job model + execution
milestones.goal: Frame what every runtime does. Tier ladders: interpreter, baseline JIT, optimising JIT, deopt.

milestones.title: Phase 2 — Memory & GC
milestones.goal: Allocation, escape analysis, generational/concurrent/pauseless collectors, read/write barriers.

milestones.title: Phase 3 — Scheduling
milestones.goal: Cooperative vs preemptive, async runtimes, fibers, work-stealing, goroutine + BEAM schedulers.

milestones.title: Phase 4 — Isolation
milestones.goal: Process, thread, V8 isolate, Wasm sandbox, Firecracker, gVisor.

milestones.title: Phase 5 — Observability & control
milestones.goal: Sampling profilers, JFR, async-profiler, Go pprof, eBPF runtime hooks.

milestones.title: Phase 6 — Language runtimes deep-dive
milestones.goal: Pick at least one outside your comfort zone: JVM, Go, BEAM, V8, or .NET CLR.

milestones.title: Phase 7 — AI inference runtimes
milestones.goal: vLLM PagedAttention, SGLang RadixAttention, llama.cpp, TensorRT-LLM, continuous batching.

milestones.title: Phase 8 — Edge & serverless runtimes
milestones.goal: Workers, Deno, Bun, wasmtime, Firecracker — cold start, isolate startup, multi-tenant scheduling.

milestones.title: Phase 9 — Synthesis project
milestones.goal: Ship one of: cross-runtime benchmark, tier-up JIT, mini paged KV-cache, or isolate sandbox.

roadmaps.title: The Software Engineering Landscape (2026)
roadmaps.goal: Get a working mental model of every major systems-software domain — LLMs, DBs, streaming, game engines, containers, browsers, compilers, OS, networking, distributed, build, crypto.
roadmaps.description: Companion to docs/learning/swe-landscape.md. One milestone per domain, each a link hub to canonical sources. Pick 2-3 milestones to go deep on; treat the rest as vocabulary.

milestones.title: LLMs and inference engines
milestones.goal: Transformers end-to-end, KV cache, paged attention, quantization.

milestones.title: Databases and storage engines
milestones.goal: B-trees, LSM, WAL, MVCC, columnar — see the dedicated DB roadmap.

milestones.title: Streaming and event systems
milestones.goal: Append-only logs, partitions, watermarks, stateful stream processing.

milestones.title: Game engines and real-time graphics
milestones.goal: Fixed-step loops, ECS, render pipelines, GPU command buffers.

milestones.title: Containers and orchestration
milestones.goal: Linux namespaces, cgroups, OCI runtimes, Kubernetes scheduling.

milestones.title: Browsers (Chromium, Firefox, Servo)
milestones.goal: Parser, layout, JS engine, compositor, sandboxing, WebAssembly.

milestones.title: Compilers and language runtimes
milestones.goal: Lexer → parser → AST → IR → optimization → codegen; GC, JIT.

milestones.title: Operating systems and kernels
milestones.goal: Processes, virtual memory, schedulers, file systems, syscalls.

milestones.title: Networking and protocols
milestones.goal: TCP/IP, TLS, HTTP/2 and HTTP/3, QUIC, BGP.

milestones.title: Distributed systems
milestones.goal: Consensus, replication, 2PC, gossip, vector clocks.

milestones.title: Build systems and developer tooling
milestones.goal: Incremental builds, content-addressed caches, LSP, tree-sitter.

milestones.title: Cryptography (applied)
milestones.goal: Primitives, signatures, AEAD, TLS, MLS, ZKPs.

roadmaps.title: LLD Practice
roadmaps.goal: Build the design-rounds muscle: model state and behaviour explicitly, justify every class boundary.
roadmaps.description: A 30-day sprint through the canonical low-level-design problems. Patterns first, then applied "design X" exercises. End able to walk through a parking lot, ticketing system, or game design with implementation and tradeoff notes.

milestones.title: Days 1-7 — Modelling foundations
milestones.goal: State, behaviour, extension points. The vocabulary every LLD problem reaches for.

milestones.title: Days 8-18 — Patterns in practice
milestones.goal: The handful of patterns that earn their weight in real interviews.

milestones.title: Days 19-30 — Applied designs
milestones.goal: Take the patterns into full design problems with concurrency and inventory edge cases.

roadmaps.title: HLD Practice
roadmaps.goal: Be able to design X — feed, chat, ride-hailing, search — under a 45-minute clock with credible numbers.
roadmaps.description: A 30-day sprint through high-level system design. Primitives first (load balancing, consistent hashing, consensus), then full-stack "design X" cases. End comfortable scoping requirements, capacity, storage choice, queue boundaries, and failure modes.

milestones.title: Days 1-7 — Primitives
milestones.goal: The building blocks every HLD answer relies on.

milestones.title: Days 8-14 — Distributed components
milestones.goal: Storage, infra, messaging — what sits behind the LB.

milestones.title: Days 15-30 — Full system cases
milestones.goal: Walk a complete "design X" with capacity, storage choice, and failure modes.

roadmaps.title: DSA Practice
roadmaps.goal: Solve canonical patterns from scratch — no references, explain the invariant, add one edge-case test.
roadmaps.description: A 30-day algorithmic sprint covering the NeetCode roadmap surface area. End able to recognise the pattern from problem shape, implement cleanly, and reason about complexity without slipping.

milestones.title: Days 1-5 — Arrays & strings
milestones.goal: The pattern recognition that unlocks 30%+ of interview problems.

milestones.title: Days 6-10 — Linear structures
milestones.goal: Stack, linked list, math/geometry — the bread-and-butter scaffolds.

milestones.title: Days 11-16 — Trees & heaps
milestones.goal: Recursive thinking and priority-queue patterns.

milestones.title: Days 17-21 — Search & greedy
milestones.goal: Two of the highest-leverage problem-solving frames.

milestones.title: Days 22-27 — Graphs
milestones.goal: Traversal, shortest-path, union-find, backtracking — the harder half of any interview.

milestones.title: Days 28-30 — DP & bit tricks
milestones.goal: The "hardest" categories — 1D/2D DP and bit manipulation.

roadmaps.title: 30-Day Math Rating Climb
roadmaps.goal: Raise your per-roadmap ELO by climbing from linear algebra through statistics to calculus — each week unlocks harder drills at your edge.
roadmaps.description: Like chess ratings: you start near 1500, solve drills matched to your level, and harder problems appear as you improve. Four weeks through the foundations that underpin ML, search evals, and systems reasoning.

milestones.title: Week 1 — Linear algebra
milestones.goal: Vectors, matrices, and the geometric picture behind embeddings and layers.

milestones.title: Week 2 — Probability & description
milestones.goal: Uncertainty bookkeeping and summarizing data without lying.

milestones.title: Week 3 — Inference
milestones.goal: Confidence intervals and hypothesis tests — the math behind A/B readouts.

milestones.title: Week 4 — Calculus bridge
milestones.goal: Gradients and optimization — the runway into gradient descent and training.

roadmaps.title: 30-Day Probability & Statistics
roadmaps.goal: Active probability & statistics — solve, derive, implement. No passive video watching as a substitute for problems.
roadmaps.description: Daily (5d/wk): 45m concepts (canonical externals) + 45m problems + 15m notes. Every week ships code or a writeup. External-heavy (Seeing Theory, MIT OCW, StatQuest, ISL). Not aesthetic math — the gym is solving, simulating, checking assumptions.

milestones.title: Week 1 — Probability
milestones.goal: Conditional probability, distributions, expectation — the language of uncertainty.

milestones.title: Week 2 — Summaries & sampling
milestones.goal: Describe data honestly; understand why averages become Normal.

milestones.title: Week 3 — Inference & experiments
milestones.goal: Hypothesis tests, regression, and real A/B practice for SWE.

milestones.title: Week 4 — Bayesian & likelihood
milestones.goal: Posterior thinking and MLE — the bridge to ML loss functions.

roadmaps.title: 12-Week Active Math Stack
roadmaps.goal: Math → AI systems → distributed/data → quant tools. Active only: solve, derive, implement, simulate — never aesthetic consumption.
roadmaps.description: 5 days/week: 90m math + 30m implementation. Weeks 1–4 probability & statistics (simulate, implement stats, debunk fake signals). Weeks 5–8 linear algebra (matmul, OLS, PCA from scratch). Weeks 9–12 quant bridge (returns, vol, Sharpe, drawdown, momentum backtest vs SPY/QQQ). One public note per week. No artifact = no learning.

milestones.title: Week 1 — Probability gym
milestones.goal: Conditional probability, Bayes, distributions — plus simulate random processes.

milestones.title: Week 2 — Expectation & summaries
milestones.goal: RVs, expectation, variance — implement descriptive stats from scratch.

milestones.title: Week 3 — Sampling & CI
milestones.goal: CLT, standard error, confidence intervals.

milestones.title: Week 4 — Inference & overfitting
milestones.goal: Hypothesis tests, A/B testing, regression, bias-variance — debunk a fake signal.

milestones.title: Week 5 — Vectors & matrices
milestones.goal: Dot products, matmul, transforms — implement multiplication.

milestones.title: Week 6 — Eigen & regression geometry
milestones.goal: Eigenvalues, least squares as projection — OLS from scratch.

milestones.title: Week 7 — PCA
milestones.goal: Covariance eigenstructure — PCA without libraries.

milestones.title: Week 8 — Optimization bridge
milestones.goal: Gradients, convexity, MLE — runway to ML training.

milestones.title: Week 9 — Returns pipeline
milestones.goal: Ingest prices, compute daily returns — no look-ahead.

milestones.title: Week 10 — Risk metrics
milestones.goal: Volatility, Sharpe, drawdown, correlation matrix.

milestones.title: Week 11 — Stochastic intuition
milestones.goal: Random walks, Markov, stationarity — noise vs signal.

milestones.title: Week 12 — Backtest discipline
milestones.goal: Simple momentum vs SPY/QQQ with honest limitations.

roadmaps.title: Behavioral Practice
roadmaps.goal: Have a STAR-shaped story for every Amazon-style leadership principle, with one self-aware "what I would do differently".
roadmaps.description: A 30-day pass through behavioural interview frames. Two stories per dimension, each with situation, action, result, and a learned lesson. End able to map an unfamiliar question to a relevant story in under 10 seconds.

milestones.title: Days 1-10 — Self & ownership
milestones.goal: Leadership, ownership, customer obsession, innovation.

milestones.title: Days 11-20 — Working with people
milestones.goal: Teamwork, conflict, communication.

milestones.title: Days 21-30 — Judgment under pressure
milestones.goal: Decision-making, failure, prioritisation.
